biography: Mikko is a formidable presence on the golf course, known for his steely focus and unwavering determination. Hailing from Kurk Golf, Mikko has cultivated a reputation as a player who never backs down from a challenge.

With one appearance at the Hector Trophée, Mikko is no stranger to the pressures of high-stakes competition. While the Hector Trophée and Victor Trophy titles have eluded him thus far, Mikko's commitment to the sport remains absolute. He is known to analyze his own game in excruciating detail, constantly looking for ways to improve his performance.

Although Mikko is not scheduled to participate in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, his presence is still felt among his peers. Whether he will make a last-minute entry remains to be seen, but one thing is certain: Mikko's passion for golf burns bright.
